'''鈭歯-m-dh-s''' ('''kanamdhesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:turnpike|turnpike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-m-dh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:turnpike|turnpike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-m-dh-s
|-
! Lemma
| kanamdhesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinamdhesoko|thinamdhesoko]] || [[word:jinamdhesoko|jinamdhesoko]] || [[word:shinamdhesoko|shinamdhesoko]] || [[word:kinamdhesoko|kinamdhesoko]]
